properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: Build the library as a shared library instead of static. Has no effect if using header-only.

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: The path to Brotli's include directory.

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: Build type for single-configuration generators (Makefile Generators, Ninja, etc.). Typical values: Debug, Release, RelWithDebInfo, MinSizeRel; custom build types may also be defined.

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: This is the directory where this CMakeCache.txt was created

properties.value: Full path to the compiler used for language <LANG>. Set by CMake during compiler detection on the first configure; users may override on the command line to select a specific toolchain.

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: Enable output of a compile_commands.json file listing the exact compiler invocation for each translation unit. Implemented by the Makefile and Ninja generators; ignored elsewhere.

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.

properties.value: Directory under which to collect all populated content

properties.value: Disables all attempts to download or update content and assumes source dirs already exist

properties.value: Enables QUIET option for all content population

properties.value: When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content for httplib

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of json

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: If ON, uses a Python script to split the header into a compilable header & source file (requires Python v3).

properties.value: Disable the use of C++ exceptions

properties.value: Requires ZLIB to be found & linked, or fails build.

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: Uses Brotli (if available) to enable Brotli decompression support.

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: Enable feature to load system certs from the Apple Keychain.
